behavior_summary: Handles the 'U8P_HAY::look' (examine) event for a hay item: marks an info id for the item and emits a short one-line description 'hay ' to the observing process/player.
Writes an info identifier (0x0208) for the item (used to record which info line was provided), then uses a process-exclude step before delivering the description to avoid duplicate processing.
Calls Item::bark with the observing process id, the literal string 'hay ', and the item/context pointer; frees the temporary string and returns an implied success value based on the bark return.
notable_control_flow: Entry on U8P_HAY::look event -> push info id 0x0208 and item/context pointer -> set info (writes info 0x0208) -> process-exclude (guard to prevent repeat handling) -> construct literal 'hay ' -> call Item::bark(pid, 'hay ', item) -> free temporary string -> use bark retval to form implied return -> suspend/return.
No other global state is modified by this handler aside from the item info write described above.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of info id 0x0208 (what UI/info panel or internal state it corresponds to).
Precise identity and ordering of pushed parameters: which pushed value is the observing process/player id (pid) vs. the item/context pointer (BP+06h) — inferred but not explicit.
Whether the process-exclude step is strictly preventing duplicate barks, preventing concurrent processing, or serves another engine-level purpose.
Whether the return value from Item::bark is used by callers beyond this implied success (broader calling convention for 'implies' result).

main_function.name: U8P_HAY::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to a U8P_HAY::look/examine event on a hay item by recording which info line was provided (info id 0x0208) and displaying the brief description 'hay ' to the observing process/player via Item::bark.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_HAY::look) — triggered when an actor/player looks at or inspects the hay object.

function_map.name: U8P_HAY::look
function_map.role: Handle the U8P_HAY::look/examine event for the hay item; set info and display a short description.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to emit/display a short text message from the item to a target process/player.

external_calls.purpose: Display a one-line description 'hay ' to the observing process/player (parameters appear to be pid, char* 'hay ', and the item/context pointer).

writes.name: info 0x0208
writes.likely_effect: Marks which info/description line has been provided for this item instance (used by UI or engine to track that this description was shown).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles the 'U8P_HAY::look' (examine) event for a hay item: marks an info id for the item and emits a short one-line description 'hay ' to the observing process/player.
